results.title: Việt Nam treasures ties with Algeria: Ambassador
results.description: They agreed to continue promoting this valuable historical legacy by enhancing exchanges between younger generations, expanding cooperation between socio-political organisations, and fostering collaboration in the fields of economy, trade, investment, education, and people-to-people exchanges in the coming time.

results.title: Montana Republican Party rules argued in court
results.description: The internal battles within the Montana Republican Party were again being fought out in a courtroom Monday, as a judge in Helena heard testimony on whether the party’s newly adopted bylaws are valid.
